compatibilityNotes.adaptationHint: Check whether node is installed. The rest of the kit is independent of this runtime.

compatibilityNotes.requirement: Requires service: Telegram Bot API (optional notifications for drift findings)
compatibilityNotes.adaptationHint: Optional. Set TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN, SKILL_DRIFT_TELEGRAM_GROUP, and SKILL_DRIFT_TELEGRAM_TOPIC only if you want --notify delivery.
